forms.title: TRRP Business Application
forms.description: Thank you for your interest in applying for a business here in the Portico State. Please fill out the application below.

questions.label: Character Name: Discord Name & CID
What Time Zone are you?
How long have you been part of Thunder Ridge?
Character Background (Brief) — Provide a short backstory explaining who your character is and how they would realistically come to operate a business.
Proposed Business Name
Type of Business
Business location, town/area?
Business Description — Describe what your business will offer and its purpose in the community.
Products / Services Offered — List the goods or services your business will provide.
How will your business create roleplay for the server? Explain events, interactions, employment opportunities, or storylines.
Hours of Operation (Approximate)
How active will you be as the business owner? (Daily, several times a week, weekends, etc.)
Will you be hiring employees? If yes, how many? Describe positions and how you plan to manage staff.
Why should Thunder Ridge approve your business?
Please submit your business proposal link here

forms.title: Gang Whitelist Application
forms.description: Application for gang whitelist status. 8 members are MANDATORY. Story-driven RP comes before PvP.

questions.label: Gang Name
What theme/type of gang are you?
Leader Name & Discord
Underboss Name & Discord
How many members do you currently have?
Please list ALL CURRENT members with their IC Name & Discord
Where will your gang be operating out of?
Provide a summary of your gang's concept and what makes it unique.
How and why was the gang formed? Include backstory, key events, or motivations.
What does your gang want to achieve in the world?
How will your gang handle conflict with other gangs, civilians, and law enforcement?
Gang Colors / Symbols, Uniform or Clothing Style, Additional Information

forms.title: Native Whitelist Application
forms.description: Fill out this Application. Weak/low effort or AI Generated responses will not be accepted and immediately denied.

questions.label: What is the name of your Tribe?
After leaving Ambarino (Wapiti), what area/territory are you desiring to claim/fight for? Include details about structures and their intended use.
Please give a detailed Backstory of your Tribe — Explain how the group became unified.
How does your Tribe plan on role-playing their story arc?
What type of Tribe do you plan to be?
Please list ALL of your members in your Tribe (Character & Discord names). 8 members required, MAX 20.
Please list Chief (IC name & Discord name)
Please list Craftsmen and Assistant (IC name & Discord name)
Please list Medicine Man/Woman and Assistant (IC name & Discord name)
Please list Cook and Assistant (IC name & Discord name)
Please list Carver (IC name & Discord name)

forms.title: TRRP Staff Application
forms.description: Application for staff positions within Thunder Ridge. Professionalism and fair conduct required.

questions.label: Discord Name & CID
In-Game Character Name(s) — Please list ALL
What Time Zone are you?
How long have you been part of Thunder Ridge?
Average hours you play per week
When are you most active? (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Late Night, Weekends)
Have you been staff on another server before? If yes, include server name, position, duration, and reason for leaving.
Do you have experience with: RedM administration, ticket systems, conflict resolution, event hosting? Describe.
A player is yelling and disrespectful in a staff situation. How would you handle it?
Two players arguing over roleplay — both claim rule violations. What steps do you take?
You see a friend breaking server rules. What do you do?
A new player seems confused and frustrated. How would you assist them?
Why do you want to become staff on Thunder Ridge?
What makes you a good fit for a staff position?
What strengths would you bring to the team?
What is one weakness you are working on?
How do you handle stress or pressure?
What does 'leading by example' mean to you?
What is your understanding of fair and unbiased moderation?
Anything else you would like us to know?
